prompt: Create an implementable Tailwind/HTML Swiss-poster hero for an emergency transit night closure. Keep it severe and high-contrast: a black/stone split field, one Swiss red route slash or severed line, a huge 23:40 time signal, the title Night Closure, the body copy “Last trains reroute via Platform 4”, and a CTA “Check route changes”. Optimise readability without turning it into a polite accessibility handout; the title, route fact, and CTA must be readable before the geometry is admired. Make it 320px-safe with no horizontal scroll.

Optimise readability without turning it into a polite accessibility handout; the title, route fact, and CTA must be readable before the geometry is admired. Make it 320px-safe with no horizontal scroll.
